member.name: T:AkWwiseTreeWAAPIDataSource
member.summary: This class communicates with Wwise Authoring via AkWaapiUtilities to keep track of the Wwise object hierarchy in the project. This hierarchy information is stored in a tree structure and is used by the Wwise Picker when it is in WAAPI mode. Changes to the project are received via WAAPI subscriptions.

member.name: M:AkWwiseTreeWAAPIDataSource.SubscribeTopics
member.summary: Subscribes to nameChanged, childAdded, childRemoved, and selectionChanged WAAPI events in order to keep the picker in sync with the Wwise project explorer.

member.name: M:AkWwiseComponentPicker.GetObjectPickerControlID
member.summary: Return last control Id which opened the window

member.name: F:AkWwiseComponentPicker.LastFocusedWindow
member.summary: The window to repaint after closing the picker
